signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's official annual inflation rate rose to 2.7% in March 2026 from 1.9% in February, confirming preliminary estimates and marking the highest since January 2024 (+2.9%), driven by a 7.2% surge in energy prices including fuel (+20%) and heating oil (+44.4%) amid the Iran war.[1][2][3]
